expressions.english: a person who one doesn't know; a stranger
a phone number that one doesn't recognize
expressions.notes:
번호 = number
번호 is often used when referring one's phone number.

expressions.english: something that one has not heard of before; a story that one has not heard before
I don't know.; I'm not sure.
So, only I didn't know?
expressions.notes: -던 것이다 is a sentence ending that expresses a fact which was previously not revealed.

expressions.english: I don't know who that is.
expressions.notes:
누구 = who
-(느)지 is a verb ending that comes before words such as "to know," "to ask," "to not know," "to find out," etc, to show what the speaker is referring to.

expressions.english: Don't pretend that you don't know.
I don't know what you are talking about.
I don't know this neighborhood that well, either.
I don't know where it is.
For now, please pretend that you don't know about it yet.
It'll be better for you not to know about it yet.
expressions.notes: 좋다 = to be good, likable; be desirable; to be nice; to like

expressions.english: I received a phone call from a number that I don't know.
expressions.notes:
전화 = phone call; telephone
전화기 오다 = to get a phone call

expressions.english: There is nothing he doesn't know.
It's okay if you don't know. You can just ask.
expressions.notes:
-이/어/여도 괜찮다 = to be okay to + V
몰라보다 = to ask
-(이)면 돼다 = to be just supposed to + V; to just have to + V; can just + V

expressions.korean: 어디에 가야 살 수 있는지 몰라요.
expressions.english: I don't know where I need to go to buy this.
expressions.notes: -이/어/어-(으)는 + 있다 = to have to + V₁ + to be able to + V₂

expressions.english: No matter how much I think about it, I still don't know the answer.
expressions.notes:
아무리 = no matter + adjective/adverb
생각하다 = to think
답 = answer; correct answer; reply

expressions.english: If there is something that you don't know, please ask me.
We were busy talking, so we didn't notice the passage of time.
expressions.notes:
이야기하다 = to talk, speak, say, tell; to have a conversation; to tell a story
는 줄 모르다 = to not know/notice + S + V

expressions.korean: 모르는 사람을 함부로 따라가면 안 돼요.
expressions.english: You shouldn't carelessly follow a stranger.
